System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 743
Receive ID 763
Functional Addr 51
Functional Name Tableau de bord

ECUDocs

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.

HQ

London, United Kingdom
